vocabulary.chinese: 好的读物；好书（或文章等）
vocabulary.example_sentence: This novel is a good read for young students.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这部小说是年轻学生的好读物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The boys love an adventure story full of danger.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 男孩子们喜欢充满危险的冒险故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She enjoys fantasy books about magic kingdoms.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她喜欢关于魔法王国的幻想小说。

vocabulary.chinese: 悬疑小说；神秘的事物；奥秘
vocabulary.example_sentence: He stayed up late reading a mystery novel.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他熬夜读一部悬疑小说。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The library has a large section of fiction.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 图书馆有一个很大的小说区。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The detective solved the case before midnight.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 侦探在午夜之前破案了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The science fiction story is about an alien visitor.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这部科幻故事讲述了一个外星访客。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The hero had to attack the enemy at dawn.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 英雄不得不在黎明时分进攻敌人。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Have you ever heard of this famous writer?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你听说过这位著名作家吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: The prince ruled a peaceful kingdom in the story.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 故事中，王子统治着一个和平的王国。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She prefers historical novels set in ancient times.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她更喜欢以古代为背景的历史小说。

vocabulary.chinese: 强迫；迫使；用力推动；力；武力
vocabulary.example_sentence: Nothing can force me to stop reading this book.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 什么都不能强迫我停止读这本书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The thief tried to steal gold from the castle.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 小偷试图从城堡偷走黄金。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The king will punish anyone who breaks the law.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 国王将惩罚任何违法的人。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We learned an idiom from the English textbook.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们从英语课本中学了一个习语。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I recently finished a book about space travel.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我最近读完了一本关于太空旅行的书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The main character felt lost in the big city.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 主人公在大城市中感到迷失。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Be careful not to get lost in the forest.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 小心不要在森林里迷路。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The librarian will recommend a book for you.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 图书管理员会为你推荐一本书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The story shows how society changed over time.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 故事展示了社会如何随时间而变化。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She won a prize for her literary work.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她因其文学作品获奖。

vocabulary.chinese: 以……为据点；根基；基础；根据地
vocabulary.example_sentence: The film is based on a true story.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这部电影根据真实故事改编。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Writers often base stories on real events.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 作家们常根据真实事件创作故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Write a short summary of the chapter you read.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 写一段你所读章节的简短概要。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The spoiled boy never shared his toys.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个被宠坏的男孩从不分享玩具。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A selfish person thinks only about himself.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 自私的人只考虑自己。

vocabulary.chinese: 令人痛苦的；（身体部位）疼痛的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Saying goodbye at the end was a painful moment.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最后的告别是一个令人痛苦的时刻。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please lock the door before you leave.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 离开前请锁好门。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Remember to lock up the library at night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 记得晚上锁好图书馆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She used a key to unlock the hidden room.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她用钥匙打开了隐藏房间的门。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They found a hidden message in the old book.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在旧书中发现了一条隐藏的信息。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Nobody knew the secret of the treasure.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 没有人知道宝藏的秘密。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The hero was brave; therefore, the people trusted him.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 英雄很勇敢，因此人们信任他。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please state your opinion clearly in the essay.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请在作文中清楚地陈述你的观点。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He was too weak to lift the heavy box.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他太虚弱了，抬不起那个沉重的箱子。

vocabulary.chinese: 自……以后；从……以来；既然；由于
vocabulary.example_sentence: I have loved reading since I was six.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我从六岁起就热爱阅读。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She secretly read the letter behind the door.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她躲在门后偷偷读了那封信。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The facts will prove that he is innocent.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 事实将证明他是无辜的。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The soldier got to his feet and continued the fight.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 士兵站起身来，继续战斗。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Day by day, the story became more exciting.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 故事一天天地变得越来越精彩。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The build-up to the final battle was thrilling.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 最后一场战斗前的铺垫令人紧张兴奋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The climax of the novel kept me on the edge of my seat.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 小说的高潮让我坐立不安。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The book had a deep effect on my thinking.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这本书对我的思想产生了深远的影响。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They arrived in time to save the village.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们及时赶到，拯救了村庄。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Every reader will find something to enjoy here.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每位读者都能在这里找到喜欢的东西。

vocabulary.chinese: 图书管理员；图书馆馆长
vocabulary.example_sentence: The librarian helped me choose a good read.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 图书管理员帮我挑选了一本好书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Consider reading this book before the test.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 考试前不妨读读这本书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The hero finally defeated his enemy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 英雄最终击败了他的敌人。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The naughty boy hid his homework under the bed.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 淘气的男孩把作业藏在床底下。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She spoke in a gentle voice to the child.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她用温柔的声音对孩子说话。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our team will defeat the champions next week.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们队下周将战胜冠军队。

vocabulary.example_sentence: You need a basic understanding of grammar to write well.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 要写好作文，需要掌握基本的语法。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Thank you for your recommendation of this novel.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 谢谢你推荐这部小说。

vocabulary.chinese: 美国的；美洲的；美国人；美洲人
vocabulary.example_sentence: He is reading an American classic this month.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他这个月在读一部美国经典著作。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The dog buried a bone in the garden.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 狗在花园里埋了一根骨头。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I doubt that the story ends happily.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我怀疑这个故事会有圆满结局。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Great books inspire us to dream bigger.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 好书激励我们拥有更大的梦想。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The fire could destroy the old library.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 大火可能会摧毁这座旧图书馆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The introduction explains the main ideas of the book.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 序言介绍了本书的主要观点。
